problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Nanoparticle. Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
